title: Community Bulletin Board
subtitle: Quick questions, gear advice, and community updates

composer.title: Create Post
composer.placeholder: What's on your mind? Ask a question, share an update, or connect with fellow outdoor enthusiasts...

delete.title: Delete Post
delete.confirmPost: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
delete.confirmReply: Are you sure you want to delete this reply?
delete.confirmWithReplies: This post has replies. The post content will be replaced with '[Post deleted by user]' but replies will remain visible.

report.title: Report Content
report.subtitle: Help us maintain a safe community

empty.title: Be the first to post!
empty.subtitle: Start a conversation with the GearShack community. Ask a question, share gear advice, or plan your next adventure.

noResults.title: No posts found
noResults.subtitle: Try adjusting your search or filter settings

errors.postTooLong: Post must be 500 characters or less
errors.linkedContentIncomplete: Both content type and ID must be provided together
errors.detailsTooLong: Details must be 500 characters or less
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load posts. Please try again.
errors.createFailed: Failed to create post. Please try again.
errors.updateFailed: Failed to update post. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Failed to delete. Please try again.
errors.reportFailed: Failed to submit report. Please try again.
errors.replyFailed: Failed to post reply. Please try again.
errors.rateLimitPosts: You've reached your daily post limit ({limit}). Try again tomorrow.
errors.rateLimitReplies: You've reached your daily reply limit ({limit}). Try again tomorrow.
errors.duplicatePost: You already posted this content recently.
errors.banned: You are currently banned from the bulletin board.
errors.notAuthenticated: You must be logged in to access the bulletin board.

success.reportSubmitted: Thank you for your report. Our moderators will review it.

time.minutesAgo: {count, plural, =1 {1 minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
time.hoursAgo: {count, plural, =1 {1 hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
time.daysAgo: {count, plural, =1 {1 day ago} other {# days ago}}

moderation.title: Moderation Queue
moderation.subtitle: Review and take action on reported content
moderation.noReportsSubtitle: All reports have been reviewed. Check back later.
moderation.pendingCount: {count, plural, =1 {1 pending report} other {# pending reports}}
